Our Heritage

A Legacy of
Handwoven Art

VastraAyu was born from a deep reverence for India's textile heritage. We work directly with master weavers from Varanasi, Kanchipuram, Chanderi, and Murshidabad — bringing their centuries-old craft to your doorstep.

Every saree in our collection is a testament to the extraordinary skill of Indian artisans, chosen for its quality, authenticity, and timeless beauty.

Be the first to know about new collections, exclusive offers & artisan stories

Our Heritage

About Us

10+
Years
Who We Are

Woven with
Passion & Purpose

VastraAyu was founded with a singular mission — to preserve and celebrate India's extraordinary saree-weaving traditions while making them accessible to the modern woman.

We travel to the source: the loom-houses of Varanasi, the silk farms of Kanchipuram, the weaver villages of Chanderi, and the cotton fields of Murshidabad. We build lasting relationships with master artisans, ensuring they receive fair wages and recognition for their craft.

Each saree that enters our collection has been touched by human hands at every stage — from the raw thread to the finishing blouse. We carry no mass-produced fabrics; only pieces that carry the soul of their makers.

Our Values

What We Stand For

🌿

Sustainability

Natural dyes, eco-friendly processes, and support for traditional hand-weaving over power looms.

✦

Authenticity

Every piece comes with a certificate of origin and the name of the artisan who created it.

◎

Fair Trade

Direct partnerships with weavers ensuring equitable pricing and dignity of labour.
